steps.title: Fastest path: graph or solve the equation
steps.content:
Type the equation into Desmos as written:
$$(x-16)(x-10)(x+7)(x+17)=0$$Graph it and use the visible intercept, root, or vertex the question asks for. The requested value is $16$ or $10$.

steps.title: Identify the positive solution
steps.content: The positive solutions are $16$ and $10$. The answer is 16 or 10.
